visa_types.name: Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Get all the documents required for your application.
The Checklist for the Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa explains which documents you need to provide and which requirements they must meet.
Checklist for Minor
Application form for Schengen Visa in English
Application form for Schengen Visa in Swedish
To be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 03 November 2025 for Visiting Relatives And Friends Visa are:

[Table:   Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa]
The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Cash or QR Code.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants with their visa fee payment with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service charge:

Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of NPR. 1664 (10 EUROS)
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge (inclusive of all taxes), by Cash/ Online/QR scan.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee and service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable.
visa_types.processing_time: Processing time is usually 15 calendar days from the day the application reaches to the Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.
visa_types.forms:
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form 

Mandatory Consent Form for Minors
Admissibility Check list 
Power of Attorney
241011 Invitation form Schengen visa
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa have to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application
                                                                        to the Sweden Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number
                                                                        of days, or from the point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa have to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application
                                                                        to the Sweden Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number
                                                                        of days, or from the point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 03 November 2025 for Visiting Relatives And Friends Visa are:

[Table:   Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa]
The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Cash or QR Code.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants with their visa fee payment with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service charge:

Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of NPR. 1664 (10 EUROS)
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge (inclusive of all taxes), by Cash/ Online/QR scan.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee and service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
Get all the documents required for your application.
The Checklist for the Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa explains which documents you need to provide and which requirements they must meet.
Checklist for Minor
Application form for Schengen Visa in English
Application form for Schengen Visa in Swedish
To be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
Photographs
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be
                                                                            apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes and eyebrows must not be covered, the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time is usually 15 calendar days from the day the application reaches to the Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.

## Download Forms
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form 

Mandatory Consent Form for Minors
Admissibility Check list 
Power of Attorney
241011 Invitation form Schengen visa

visa_types.name: Short Term Visa - For Nepal
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a short visit to the Sweden and you do not have Sweden nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. The Sweden is one of the 26 European countries forming the Schengen
                                                            Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
Processing Time: 
Processing of visa application through VFS will be given priority by the Embassy and the processing time is usually 20 calendar days from the day the application was submitted to VFS in Kathmandu.
                                                            Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.
visa_types.full_text:
If you are planning a short visit to the Sweden and you do not have Sweden nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. The Sweden is one of the 26 European countries forming the Schengen
                                                            Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
Processing Time: 
Processing of visa application through VFS will be given priority by the Embassy and the processing time is usually 20 calendar days from the day the application was submitted to VFS in Kathmandu.
                                                            Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.

visa_types.name: EU - Regulation
visa_types.overview:
- Application can be submitted six (06) months prior to the date of departure.
- From May 1, 2010 only passports issued within the previous ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3) months longer than the intended stay.
The list of Schengen countries are as follows:
                                                        

[Table:EU - Regulation]

## Documents Required
Get all the documents required for your application.
The Checklist for the Seaman Visa explains which documents you need to provide and which requirements they must meet.
Checklist for Minor
Application form for Schengen Visa in English
Application form for Schengen Visa in Swedish
To be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
Photographs
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be
                                                                            apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes and eyebrows must not be covered, the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time is usually 15 calendar days from the day the application reaches to the Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than New Delhi will take another two days due to postal delivery.

## Download Forms
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form 

Mandatory Consent Form for Minors
Admissibility Check list 
Power of Attorney

Checklist for Minor

To be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents.

visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees applicable with effect from 03 November 2025 for Cultural, Sport or Religious events Visa are:

[Table:   Cultural, Sport or Religious events Visa]
The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Cash or QR Code.
There is a bank counter available at VFS office to assist applicants with their visa fee payment with an additional NPR 1250/-
VFS Service charge:

Applicants applying at the Swedish Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of NPR. 1664 (10 EUROS)
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge (inclusive of all taxes), by Cash/ Online/QR scan.
Please Note:
- The Visa fee and service charges is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS service charges will be applicable.
